headers.value: accelerometer=(), autoplay=(self "https://music.yandex.ru"), camera=(), display-capture=(), encrypted-media=(self "https://music.yandex.ru"), geolocation=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=(), microphone=(), payment=(), usb=()
